summary: All provided scenarios for the main function are fully covered by the final test cases. The single scenario SC030 is covered by 14 test cases (TC071 to TC083 and TC048 from the previous review). All test cases are traceable to requirement IDs BR006 and FR004. Previous coverage issues have been resolved. Test cases are clear, executable, and verifiable. No missing scenarios or weak test cases were identified. Coverage aligns with the test scope for negative, positive, boundary, business rule, and integration categories.

resolved_issues.issue: Previous review only had one test case (TC048) for scenario SC030, missing coverage for resend timing, boundary conditions, and multiple resend scenarios.
resolved_issues.resolution: Added 13 additional test cases (TC071 to TC083) covering negative, positive, boundary, and multiple resend scenarios for account state after 24 hours without verification.
